workOrder.summary: Add in-page status filters to the student Feedback History panel.
workOrder.selectionReason: The prior handoff explicitly pointed at compare or filter affordances for the existing student-safe feedback timeline, and current workspace.js still rendered a flat feedback list even though the own-student payload already exposed feedback status, version context, and real timeline actions.

repoGroundedFindings: renderStudentFeedbackPanel() already rendered own-student feedback rows with real View timeline actions, but it had no in-page filter controls.
Current /api/student/dashboard feedback rows already included status, submissionStatus, submissionVersion, requirementTitle, message, authorName, and submissionId.

Current /api/reviews/:submissionId/history was already student-safe and filtered for visible comments, so the safest slice was to focus the existing panel without adding routes, query params, or new access.
changes: Added Feedback History filters for all notes, needs revision, teacher notes, and approved feedback in workspace.js.
Kept feedback-row timelines on the selected row when visible and cleared hidden feedback-row timelines when a filter removed that row from the panel.
Added focused workspace coverage proving the filter controls render, narrow the feedback panel to action-needed rows, and clear hidden feedback-row timeline state.

candidates.candidate: Viewer vs manager Operations copy branch

validation.notes: Focused and full validation passed. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when hosted fake-account proof and audit-event writes are allowed; otherwise inspect compare affordances for the existing student-safe feedback timeline before adding a new student page.
